Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class DeleteEvent

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.DeleteEvent
public class DeleteEvent extends SObject

Java class for DeleteEvent complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DeleteEvent">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="DeletedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeletedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeletedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Record" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SobjectName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
